---
title: "Wenwen Zhang"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:wez105@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/wenwen-zhang-7696a1223/
---

Hi! I'm Wenwen Zhang, a graduate student at UC San Diego.

I created this website to share my resume, some projects, and coursework from my program.

## About Me

I enjoy learning new tools and trying to apply them to real-world problems. Through my coursework, I’ve had the chance to explore different ways of thinking about data and decision-making.

Outside of school, I like exploring new places, trying different foods, and spending time with friends.

## What You'll Find Here

- My resume
- A few projects I’ve worked on
- A blog post from my statistics class
